description: Enormous legal document. Fragment (upper left corner). Very faded. Probably a ketubba (בשעה מעולה...) or replacement ketubba (based on the phrase used to introduce the bride, אמר לנא דסת אלחסן...). The wife/bride is Sitt al-Ḥusn. Many more details could be extracted with effort (or with multispectral imaging).
